CWNCE.Settings.ShowExactAc.Name: Show exact target AC to players
CWNCE.Settings.ShowExactAc.Hint: When enabled, players see the target's exact melee or ranged AC. GMs always see exact AC.
CWNCE.Settings.AutomateNpcArmor.Name: Calculate NPC defenses from active armor
CWNCE.Settings.AutomateNpcArmor.Hint: When enabled, ticked NPC armor determines AC, Soak, and Trauma protection. Manual Base AC and Melee AC remain the unarmored fallback.
CWNCE.Armor.ReadyBeforeEquipping: Move this armor to Readied before equipping it.
CWNCE.Chat.Heading: Target Check
CWNCE.Chat.NoTargets: No targets were selected when this attack was rolled.
CWNCE.Chat.TargetUnavailable: A captured target is no longer available.
CWNCE.Chat.WeaponRanges: Weapon range: {normal} m normal / {maximum} m maximum
CWNCE.Chat.ApplyDamageHint: Applies normal or Trauma damage separately to every target marked HIT.
CWNCE.Chat.AlreadyApplied: Damage has already been applied from this attack card.
CWNCE.Chat.SceneUnavailable: The attack targets are not available on the current scene.
CWNCE.Chat.NoDamageTargets: No HIT targets were available to receive damage.
CWNCE.Chat.DamageFailed: Damage application failed. Check the console and use SWNR's standard buttons if needed.
CWNCE.Breakdown.Heading: Modifier Breakdown
CWNCE.Suppress.Dialog.AimHint: Target exactly one token to aim the 90-degree cone. Every visible token inside it will be checked.
CWNCE.Suppress.Dialog.Braced: The weapon is properly braced or mounted.
CWNCE.Suppress.Dialog.Affected: Affected tokens (tick Hard Cover to exclude)
CWNCE.Suppress.Dialog.Title: Confirm Suppressive Fire
CWNCE.Suppress.Errors.Scene: Suppressive Fire requires an actor token on the current scene.
CWNCE.Suppress.Errors.Ineligible: This weapon is not configured for Suppressive Fire.
CWNCE.Suppress.Errors.AimTarget: Control the shooter and target exactly one token to aim the Suppressive Fire cone.
CWNCE.Suppress.Errors.Range: This weapon needs a positive normal range for Suppressive Fire.
CWNCE.Suppress.Errors.Ammo: This weapon needs at least 2 rounds for Suppressive Fire.
CWNCE.Suppress.Errors.NoTargets: No visible tokens are inside the Suppressive Fire cone and normal range.
CWNCE.Suppress.Errors.NotBraced: Suppressive Fire was cancelled because the weapon was not confirmed as braced or mounted.
CWNCE.Suppress.Errors.Failed: Suppressive Fire could not be resolved. Check the console for details.
CWNCE.Suppress.Chat.Title: {weapon} - Suppressive Fire
CWNCE.Suppress.Chat.Summary: 90-degree cone - {range} m normal range - {ammo} ammo spent
CWNCE.Suppress.Chat.HalfDamage: Failed Evasion Save: {amount} damage before Trauma
CWNCE.Suppress.Chat.Manual: EVASION SAVE MUST BE CHECKED MANUALLY
